overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a vibrant marshland and meadow toward a rural village. The scene features a distinctive bright turquoise sky, lush vegetation with wildflowers, and a large oak tree as a central landmark.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow marsh with wildflowers and reeds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow marsh water toward a distant landmark tree

entered.detail: shallow reflective water covering ground with ripples around character's legs
tall green reeds and grass growing in the marsh water
dense forest of deciduous trees surrounding the marsh clearing
massive solitary oak tree with thick trunk visible on the horizon
purple lavender flowers growing among the marsh grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow marsh with water reaching mid-calf, surrounded by tall reeds and purple wildflowers. A large oak tree stands as a distant landmark against a bright turquoise sky, with dense forest lining the edges of the clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow transitioning to dirt path

events.description: exits shallow water onto grassy bank and meadow
transitions from tall grass onto defined dirt path

agents.ego_description: moving from marsh onto dry grassland and then onto a winding dirt path

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail cutting through the grassland toward the tree
dense green shrubs flanking the sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the water behind and walks through tall grass onto a dirt path. The large oak tree grows closer ahead while bushes line the path sides, and the marshy forest gives way to open meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path ascending toward large oak tree

events.description: begins ascending gentle slope on dirt path toward tree

agents.ego_description: walking up the dirt path approaching the large oak tree landmark

entered.detail: simple wooden fence posts running alongside the path
traditional timber-framed cottage with thatched roof visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The path climbs gently toward the massive oak tree, which now dominates the center of view. A wooden fence appears on the left, and a rural cottage becomes visible in the distance beyond the tree as the character approaches the landmark.

events.description: turns right at path intersection near the large oak tree
rural cottages and village structures become prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: passing the large oak tree and turning right toward the rural village

entered.detail: rolling green hills visible on the horizon beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The character passes the massive oak tree on the left and turns right at a path intersection. The rural cottage moves closer into clear view ahead, with rolling hills visible in the distance, as the character approaches the village outskirts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant marshland that gradually opens into a rural village landscape. It begins with the character wading through shallow water and purple wildflowers under a bright turquoise sky, with a distant oak tree serving as a focal point. As the character leaves the water behind, the terrain shifts from marshy reeds to a dirt path cutting through tall grass and open meadows. The scene then climbs gently toward the massive oak tree, which grows to dominate the view as a wooden fence and a distant cottage emerge from the horizon. Finally, the camera passes the landmark and turns at a path intersection, moving toward the rural cottage and rolling hills at the outskirts of the village.
